Absolutely fantastic educational tool.. Just wish if the can add more ER scenarios..

Ok so the voices over lap when you get to click happy but man wow love it for real we do need more levels though worth the try for sure wish you could have a freedom mode to cause havoc.... but that's just the immature side of me
LOVE IT!! But you forget we're wearing a large headset so lookin down while standing so close to the patient is uncomfortable for the neck.  Don't wanna have to go to real doctor for neck pain.
I love it .Itso
Can't wait for more cases.
So far from what I want to be when I grow up this is good
It's a medical training simulation app,  not a game app. It's test the medical knowledge of a health care worker. Only idiots think it's a game app.
More  scenarios pleaaaaase!!
Idfk

reviews.review_title: Great games but has a lot of glitches.
reviews.review_description: With all that being said it's a great teaching tool. But it doesn't come with flaws. I tried to beat the operation following instructions after a point you end up trying to select the right tool for the job. But the tools your looking  exist on the operating table full of the tools you need to complete a successful operations. So that's when I realized from my c.
A few glitches here and there, but will be very useful for medical students when it's  finished.
Interesting for a bit, but keep in mind it's an educational tool. Surgeon Simulator this is not.

reviews.review_title: Good for medics but has issues
reviews.review_description: Good clear graphics and shows potential for students but there are glitches that prevented me progressing, namely the virtual hand would disappear and no what object I picked up it would tell me it was incorrect.
Great app go dee video thumbs up
Terrific first step from RCSI showing how VR can change training. Brilliant innovation and excited to see it evolve.

reviews.review_title: Cant wait till the next experience.
reviews.review_description: Hoping its a similar simulation style.

Medical student chiming in; this is a great app. I can see this as one of the first apps of many more to come that can help train medical personel with virtual reality simulations.  Thanks for putting this together. I would love to see objective research data about the effectiveness of this as a teaching tool, and to increase physician comfort with emergencies.

when will the game be updated to allow for more options than yhe accident and emergency dept. room its been a while since release and no sign of the wards or any other diffrent job in the hospital

please update this helps me in case studys training and im planning to become a medical student
